name: Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter and flour one loaf pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Sift together flour, salt, sugar, and baking soda.
4. Mix the pumpkin, oil, eggs, 1/4 cup water, and spices together.
5. Combine with the dry ingredients.
6. Stir in the nuts.
7. Pour into loaf pan and bake for 60 to 90 minutes.
8. Cool and serve.
